---
title: "Bonnie Reiss Poster"
format: html
description: "This is the poster I created for my work in the Bonnie Reiss Food and Agriculture Fellowship in 2025."
author: 
- name: "Sequoia Marx"
date: "03-10-2026"
---

This poster was initially created during Spring of 2025 for my role as a Bonnie Reiss Food and Agriculture Fellow. It was inspired by my role with the Edible Campus Program working in the community gardens. In this poster, I explore different models for community gardens, ways to engage the community, and future implications.

<object data="BonnieReiss.pptx.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800px">

<p>Your browser could not display the PDF. <a href="BonnieReiss.pptx.pdf">Download it here.</a></p>

</object>
